67.text: 24. The full text of RDC 28.64 reads

68.text: A party to whom a document has been produced may use the ocument only for the purpose of the proceedings in which it has been produced, except where:

69.text: (1) the document has been read to or by the Court , or referred to, at a hearing which has been held in public;

71.text: (3) the party who produced the document and the person to whom the document belongs agree."

72.text: 25. RDC 29.60 addresses the use of witness statements in similar terms:

73.text: A witness statement may be used only for the purpose of the proceedings in which it is served unless:
